action.reasoning: Observation: single-checkpoint TTA underperformed the 2e+3e ensemble/TTA (0.1886 vs best 0.1930), so both checkpoint ensembling and TTA contribute. Analysis: adjacent checkpoint averaging is beneficial; a more diverse checkpoint trained with Quickdraw-style augmentation scored lower alone (0.1759) but may add complementary decision boundaries. Decision: create a 3-model ensemble manifest using baseline 2e, 3e, and quickdraw-augmentation 2e checkpoints with the validated TTA path, then submit evaluation.
